top_signals.title: Latest Oil Market News and Analysis for July 22
top_signals.summary: Oil briefly spiked above $95, extending this month’s price jump to around 30%, as the US and Iran played down the prospect of peace talks and disruptions to global supplies continued to mount.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: GE Vernova Falls as Outlook Clashes With ‘Too High’ AI Hopes
top_signals.summary: GE Vernova Inc.’s shares slid after a higher revenue outlook failed to impress investors, a sign that it’s getting harder for companies that sell equipment to data centers to meet the market’s sky-high hopes.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: The US has collected about $13bn of Venezuela’s oil money. Where is it?
top_signals.summary: Washington has given diverging accounts of where the earthquake-shattered country’s funds are going
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

alerts.title: Tesla set to report second-quarter results after the bell

alerts.title: BitGo, OTC Markets plan tokenized securities access for broker-dealers
alerts.summary: The proposed alliance would enable more than 150 broker-dealers to trade and settle digital asset securities through OTC Link ATS using BitGo’s custody infrastructure.
